## Description
Clear description of security issue or improvement needed.

## Security Type
- [ ] Vulnerability fix
- [ ] Security enhancement
- [ ] Access control improvement
- [ ] Compliance requirement
- [ ] Security best practice

## Risk Assessment
- **Severity**: Low/Medium/High/Critical
- **Impact**: What could happen if not addressed
- **Affected Areas**: Which parts of the system are impacted

## Proposed Solution
Describe the security fix or improvement needed.

## Additional Context
Any security requirements, compliance standards, or related security issues.
